title: Photosynthesis
tagline: A printed square pulls live data in a stranger's browser, then draws its own child QR.
holy_shit: A printed square photosynthesizes live market data inside a stranger's browser, then draws its own offspring on-screen — no server ever touched.
agent_scenario: When a client-side artifact should both consume live data and emit a new shareable trigger, with zero backend.
author: kody-w + Claude
